title: microtoena muliensis
intro: Microtoena muliensis, a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae, is native to China and is also known as Sichuan mint or Sichuan basil. The medicinal properties of Microtoena muliensis include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities, which are attributed to its essential oils and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit immunomodulatory effects. Microtoena muliensis can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to support overall health and well-being.
